lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: By Ralos! Its[sic] the Grand Champion!

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: Its[sic] really you, isn't it? This is my best day ever!

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: Have you spoken to the minotaur? What's he like in real life?

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: You really stuck it to that Sol guy! He's not so tough now.

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: Can we get a portrait together?

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: Can you get me into the arena? They banned me after last time...

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: Can I shine your boots? Maybe polish your blade?

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: I've been thinking, we should hang out. You'd like me if you got to know me!

lines.speaker: Passionate Supporter
lines.text: Are you free this weekend? I'm free this weekend. We should hang out!
